message:
feat(compaction): add background compaction worker with quotas (bd-3ar8v.3.5)

Move LLM-based context compaction off the user-facing latency path.
The worker spawns a dedicated thread with its own async runtime so
Provider streaming IO works independently of the main agent loop.

Two-phase non-blocking approach:
- Phase 1: apply completed background result at start of turn
- Phase 2: start new background compaction if quotas allow

Quota system: cooldown (60s), timeout (120s), max 100 attempts/session.
Synchronous fallback preserved for explicit /compact commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
